# RVS CAS MBA

> NAAC A+ accredited RVS College of Arts & Science — MBA programs combining business fundamentals with analytics, technology, and applied decision-making.

## Key pages

- [Home](/): RVS CAS MBA overview
- [Programs](/programs): MBA degree and specializations
- [Admissions](/admissions): Entry requirements and process
- [How to apply](/how-to-apply): Application steps
- [Placements](/placements): Career preparation and outcomes
- [Faculty & Insights](/insights): Faculty and thought leadership
- [Thinking Like a Financial Analyst](/thinking-like-a-financial-analyst): Video learning series
- [Request information](/request-information): Brochure and enquiries

## MBA specializations (paths)

- /programs/mba-global-finance-corporate-analyst
- /programs/mba-artificial-intelligence
- /programs/mba-digital-marketing
- /programs/mba-human-resources
- /programs/mba-logistics-supply-chain-management
